summary: Iteration 15 - Frontend only. Tested the new 3-section elevator descent with grain stream LEFT-of-center. All 9 requested behaviors validated PASS on desktop 1920x1080 and mobile 375x812. Three stacked full-screen sections (hero/abyss/form) are rendered inside a translateY container. Elevator descends: 0 -> -100vh (2.2s cubic-bezier) -> hold 2.3s -> -200vh (2.8s) -> form fades in. Grain stream activates at descent start with 120 particles in core 31-38% + scatter 27-43% (LEFT of center matching the video pour) with leftward drift (-12 to -2px). 10 wisp particles activate at stage 3. Form submission transitions to Welcome screen. Admin /#admin login works with the provided password.
critical_code_review_comments: EntryForm.jsx (384 lines) still inlines grain layers and an inline <style> block with 5 keyframes. Extracting GrainLayer into a reusable component with props (count, xMin, xMax, hslRanges, animationName, drift, spin) would dedupe core (80) vs scatter (40) vs wisp (10) renders and shrink the file substantially.

Chained setTimeouts in triggerDescent() (2200ms abyss, 4500ms stage3, 7000ms form, 10000ms wisps-off) are still unguarded - if the component unmounts mid-transition, timers will fire setState on an unmounted component. Store ids in a ref array and clear them in a useEffect cleanup. Same observation from iterations 13 and 14 - not regressed but not fixed.

Hash-routing for /#admin still requires a hard reload to remount AdminDashboard. The test had to call page.reload() after navigating to /#admin because there is no `hashchange` listener. Recurring across iterations 11-15.

Video element still has no `onError`/`onStalled` handler. The fallback path relies solely on the .play() promise rejection scheduling triggerDescent at +3s. If readyState reaches HAVE_CURRENT_DATA but playback later stalls, the user can be stuck on a black video forever. Add onError/onStalled that also call triggerDescent. Recurring from iteration 14.

Geolocation reverse-lookup hits nominatim.openstreetmap.org without a User-Agent / contact header (OSM TOS recommends one). No fallback toast for blocked/denied geolocation - silent failure inside the error callback. Recurring from iterations 13-14.
test_credentials: Admin password: WEUSEDTOBECALLEDHAMLETTEA26 at /#admin - confirmed working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 introduces a 3-section elevator descent. EntryForm phases: logo -> ready -> video -> descending -> abyss -> arriving -> form. Three stacked sections (each h-screen) are rendered inside a single .will-change-transform container whose translateY is animated: 0 -> -100vh (2.2s) -> hold -> -200vh (2.8s). Confirmed in production: stream container z-200 with EXACTLY 120 particles (80 core in 31-38% x, 40 scatter in 27-43% x, both LEFT of center), core drift -12 to -2 px (leftward), wisp container z-150 with EXACTLY 10 particles (activated at stage 3). Easing cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1). Background #050403 on hero+abyss sections. data-testids stable: entry-wrapper, hero-section, abyss-section, form-section, get-started-button, hero-video, name-input, entry-submit-button, location-detecting, location-detected, admin-password-input, admin-login-button. Video fails in headless (ERR_ABORTED) so .play().catch() triggers triggerDescent at +3s after Get Started click. Admin /#admin still needs a hard reload to mount.

detailed_test_results.behavior1_logo_fade: PASS - Logo opacity @700ms = 0.40 (mid 1.5s ease-in-out fade-in from 200ms). Ready phase reached ~3s with Get Started container at opacity 0.61 and rising.
detailed_test_results.behavior2_click_get_started: PASS - After click, button container opacity drops to 0.35 (fading out via 0.8s ease). Video play().catch() schedules triggerDescent at +3s.
detailed_test_results.behavior3_elevator_stage1: PASS - 3 stacked sections present (hero 1080, abyss 1080, form 1080). Initial transform translateY(0px). After descent: transform=translateY(-100vh), transition='transform 2.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)'. Stream container z-200 mounted with EXACTLY 120 particles. Core min/max = 31.13% / 37.97% (spec 31-38%). Scatter min/max = 27.03% / 42.92% (spec 27-43%). Core drift min/max = -11.91 / -2.11 (spec -12 to -2). LEFT of center matching video pour confirmed.
detailed_test_results.behavior4_abyss_hold: PASS - At ~2.4s after descent, transform held at translateY(-100vh). Abyss section is #050403 black void. Grain stream still present with leftward drift.
detailed_test_results.behavior5_elevator_stage3: PASS - At ~4.7s after descent, transform=translateY(-200vh), transition='transform 2.8s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)'. Wisp container z-150 mounted with EXACTLY 10 particles.
detailed_test_results.behavior6_form_phase: PASS - At ~7.3s after descent, form-section .rounded-2xl opacity ramps from 0 (mid-fade observed at 0.32 then settled). Card has logo, gold h2 'Welcome', subtitle 'Premium Tea Experience', name-input, ENTER STORE button.
detailed_test_results.behavior7_form_submit: PASS - Filling 'TestUser15' + clicking entry-submit-button transitions to WelcomeScreen displaying gold 'Welcome' and 'TestUser15' (screenshot captured).
detailed_test_results.behavior8_mobile_375x812: PASS - scrollWidth == clientWidth == 375 at all 4 sampling points (logo phase, ready phase, mid-descent, form phase). No horizontal overflow.
detailed_test_results.behavior9_admin_dashboard: PASS - /#admin (with reload) -> admin-password-input present. Password WEUSEDTOBECALLEDHAMLETTEA26 + admin-login-button -> Admin Panel with Products/Reviews/Orders tabs visible and 'Welcome, Admin' toast (screenshot captured).

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - all 9 specified behaviors validated PASS. No app bugs found.
